description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:alpine Docker image and sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory in the project via a before_script. Define a variable GRADLE_OPTS with -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false and a single stage called unit-test. Add a unit-test job in the unit-test stage that runs the command gradle test, runs only on the master branch, and on failure uploads the build/reports/tests/ directory as an artifact named ${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} that expires in one week. The job should be configured with the stage, script, only rule, and artifact settings as described.
